email_previews.subject: Ida, curious how new construction and concessions fit into your San Antonio plans? 🏡✨
email_previews.body_preview:
Hey Ida,

Hope your week is going well! I wanted to check in since I sent over some listings a little while ago. Did you get a chance to look at those? I know San Antonio’s market can be a bit of a puzzle right now, especially with new construction options popping up and some sellers offering concessions.

It’s honestly a great time to explore if you’re open to fresh builds or considering timing your move for the best deals. Plus, picking the right neighborhood can make a huge difference with lifestyle here. Whether it’s easy commutes, cool coffee spots, or weekend vibes, San Antonio has a lot to offer.

What’s your feeling on new construction versus existing homes? Curious to hear what matters most to you.

Talk soon,
Peter

--
Lifestyle Design Realty
1209 S Saint Marys St #232, San Antonio, TX 78210

If you no longer want market updates from us, reply UNSUBSCRIBE and we will remove you from future marketing emails.
